```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.4em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin-left:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">SKILL.md</span>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:1em 1.4em 1.1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.7;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">---</div>
   <div><span style="color:#69B4F0;">name:</span> <span style="color:#27C93F;">api-conventions</span></div>
   <div><span style="color:#69B4F0;">description:</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">REST API conventions</span></div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">---</div>
   <div><span style="color:#FF6F8E;font-weight:700;"># API Conventions</span></div>
   <div>- kebab-case URL paths</div>
   <div>- camelCase JSON properties</div>
   <div>- pagination on every list endpoint</div>
   <div>- version in path (<span style="color:#FFB84D;">/v1/</span>)</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.55em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">
  <span style="background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">auto-trigger</span>
  on context
  <span style="color:#C4C3E8;">·</span> or <span style="color:#C4C3E8;">·</span>
  <span style="background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #E8C77E;">manual</span>
  via <code style="color:#C4881A;">/name</code>
 </div>

</div>
```
